title: Clickers club: photo adventures in curriculum
creator_credit: Jeff Spencer, Tony Paice and Corporate Development, Western Region and TV ED Productions
brief_description: Outlines the aims of a new photography club established throughout Victorian schools. Marg Sheehan interviews Leigh Hepburn who introduces the Project Kit, Roxanne Rodgers who explains its uses in an integrated curriculum and Gail Evans who applies the resources during a primary school class excursion to the zoo.
